scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w @weekly-commit/shared && cd backend && ./gradlew spotlessCheck
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w @weekly-commit/shared
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend -- --run && npm run test -w @weekly-commit/shared -- --run && cd backend && ./gradlew test
scripts.build: npm run build -w @weekly-commit/shared && npm run build -w frontend && cd backend && ./gradlew build -x test
